allow: Bash(py -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); from agents.state import AgentState; print\('OK state'\); from tools.mock_data import DOUYIN_PLANS, DASHBOARD_METRICS; print\(f'OK data: C001 roi={DOUYIN_PLANS[0][\\"roi\\"]}'\); from tools.mock_functions import get_top_campaigns, update_bid; r=get_top_campaigns\('douyin',7,'cost',5\); print\(f'OK funcs: {len\(r\)} plans'\); from tools.tool_registry import ALL_TOOLS; print\(f'OK tools: {len\(ALL_TOOLS\)}'\); from api.sse_manager import SSEManager; print\('OK sse'\); from agents.supervisor import supervisor_node; print\('OK supervisor'\); from agents.data_agent import data_agent_node; print\('OK data_agent'\); from agents.analysis_agent import analysis_agent_node; print\('OK analysis'\); from agents.strategy_agent import strategy_agent_node; print\('OK strategy'\); from agents.execute_agent import execute_agent_node; print\('OK execute'\); from agents.report_agent import report_agent_node; print\('OK report'\); from agents.graph import app, _LANGGRAPH_AVAILABLE; print\(f'OK graph \(langgraph={\\"available\\" if _LANGGRAPH_AVAILABLE else \\"not installed, using direct calls\\"}\)'\); print\('ALL OK'\)")
